embedding_text: Document ID: TEP_Fault_01 Source: Tennessee Eastman Process faulty testing data, fault starts at sample 160. Fault name: A/C feed ratio disturbance. RCA category: Feed composition/feed flow imbalance. Primary affected process unit: Feed System (F-104). Sensor anomaly fingerprint after sample 160: A Feed stream 1 decreased by ~20.8%; D Feed stream 2 decreased by ~8.5%; E Feed stream 3 decreased by ~13.5%. Likely physical interpretation: incorrect feed ratio, feed valve drift, or feed pump instability. Recommended first checks: compare live sensor trend with baseline, verify related control valve position, inspect relevant pump/utility line, check alarm sequence, and confirm with nearest SOP before intervention. Linked synthetic incidents: INC0015, INC0017, INC0031, INC0080, INC0082.
